title: Market Brief — Friday, March 27, 2026
summary: The BEP LLMflation Index sits at 21.4, down 79% from the GPT-4 launch baseline. Frontier inference continues to deflate — but unevenly. Premium holds pricing power while the commodity floor races toward zero.
paragraphs: The BEP LLMflation Index sits at 21.4, down 79% from the GPT-4 launch baseline. Frontier inference continues to deflate — but unevenly. Premium holds pricing power while the commodity floor races toward zero.
18 models tracked. 211x spread between cheapest and premium. This is bifurcation, not commoditization.
Bottom line: Track the spread between commodity and premium inference. The hardware generation determines profitability. Capital follows the margin.
